column3: Clermont County Sheriff (sheriff sales) + Auditor (forfeited land)
column4: Auditor 101 E Main St, Batavia, OH 45103
column9: Sheriff publishes live web list. Forfeited-land sales (failed tax foreclosure) = strong distinct list at Auditor.

column4: 101 E Main St, 2nd Fl, Batavia, OH 45103
column9: GOTCHA: only Mobile Home delinquent PDF posted online. Full real-estate list 'published in newspaper.' Use property search / opendata.clermontauditor.org or request certified list.

column3: City/township-level (Milford, Union Twp, Miami Twp, Batavia)
column4: Milford 745 Center St; Union Twp utclermont.gov
column9: Highly fragmented; no countywide database. Separate request to each city/township/village.

column3: Clermont Co. Permit Central / Building Inspection (+ Land Bank)
column9: No published register. Best path: Land Bank blight/demo list ($4.4M 2024 grant, 46 buildings). Request demo target list.
Searchable online via CountyFusion (Kofile) free. Some older liens not digitized. No bulk export.

column3: Clerk of Courts (Common Pleas); some also at Recorder
column9: Tax/judgment liens with Clerk; login may be needed. Federal tax liens often ALSO at Recorder - check both.
No published shut-off list. PII restrictions may limit release. Cities (Batavia) bill separately.

column3: Clermont County Permit Central / Building Inspection
column9: Self-service portal: permit+inspection data Jan 2019-present. 'Open/expired' at scale needs bulk request.

column3: Clermont County Municipal Court (Clerk of Courts)
column9: FED 'evictions' in Muni Civil. Public case system. Aggregate by plaintiff; pre-1996 only in person.
ORC 5162.211 liens filed at Recorder CountyFusion. AG admin statewide, no county list. Search by doc type/grantor.
